arts.ttl: Leeds United and Sheffield United pay emotional tribute to George Baldock at Elland Road
arts.sum: Baldock, who was with Greek side Panathinaikos when he passed away, played more than 200 games for Sheffield United during his seven years at Bramall Lane, winning two promotions to the Premier League. Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder reflected on the poignant situation before the game, saying: "It's been really difficult.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Sheffield United pay emotional tribute to George Baldock vs Leeds after death
arts.sum: Former Sheffield United defender George Baldock was found dead in his swimming pool in Athens last week and the Blades made sure to pay tribute in their first game since the tragic news

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Sheffield United as Farke makes big calls on Aaronson and Piroe
arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Joe Rothwell, Ao Tanaka; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Largie Ramazani; Joel Piroe. After two weeks of holding his breath, Daniel Farke comes into Leeds United’s Sheffield United clash with not a single change being needed.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry has already given Leeds United transfer blessing on ex-Arsenal 'police officer'
arts.sum: Thierry Henry has already given his blessing for Leeds United to sign Francis Coquelin. Reflecting on an interview from April 2015 on Sky Sports, following Arsenal's victory at Burnley, Henry lauded Coquelin: "I thought he was brilliant today.

arts.ttl: Beren Cross's Leeds United notebook with Marathe-Kinnear grilling and Elland Road survey
arts.sum: Thousands of supporters are understood to have received a survey from the club this week. Lewis Smith will officiate Leeds United's game against Sheffield United on Friday in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou sets challenge to Djed Spence as Leeds United flop extends Tottenham stay
arts.sum: Tottenham chief Ange Postecoglou has challenged Djed Spence to keep on improving after the former Leeds United loanee signed a new long-term deal with the Premier League club. arts.ttl: Blades fined again: Maybe it’s time to let the football do the talking
arts.sum: Sheffield United’s game against Leeds United tonight will be televised on Sky Sports Football. arts.ttl: Sheffield United are in Leeds’ shadow - Wilder
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder has admitted that his club perhaps perceive themselves in the shadows of Leeds United, given historic developments between the two clubs. Chris Wilder bigs up Leeds United club size

arts.ttl: Wilder pays tribute to former Blades defender Baldock
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder says George Baldock "meant so much to everybody" as he pays tribute to the former Blades defender following his shock death last week.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Ben White opens up on Bielsa's harsh treatment of him at Leeds
arts.sum: "When I first went to Leeds, I got in there, two days in I was in the first-team changing room," he said. Ben White says Marcelo Bielsa's tough training regime at Leeds United pushed him to his limits and helped shape him into the player he is today.
